markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance and pivot strategy for the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pivot:** Starting Feb 1, all content production will shift from the old product to the new AI platform, Sonar, to build pre-launch traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**New Project:** A programmatic "Agent Use Cases" page project is launching to capture high search volume; Tanmay will share the template and use case list to unblock engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Performance:** Agentic articles are showing strong initial traffic (150 peak sessions), while Data Engineering resources continue to grow (1.8K weekly sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Market Trend:** A market-wide decline in AI-driven traffic (est. -45% since July) is affecting visibility, but Airbyte's citation share remains strong.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

## Topics

### Market & Content Performance

  - [**AI-Driven Traffic Decline:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [A market-wide trend (est. -45% since July) is affecting B2B sites, driven by ChatGPT using fewer citations.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Airbyte's citation share remains strong in Scrunch and Profound, indicating content quality is not the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Agentic Articles (New Product):**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [Initial traffic is strong for a new subfolder: 150 peak sessions, now at 95 weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [Engagement is lower than desired → TLDRs will be added to improve it.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Top clusters: Context Engineering, Production AI Agents, Agent Data Infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Data Engineering Resources (Old Product):**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Continued growth, reaching 1.8K weekly sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Data Integration remains the top cohort; Data Pipeline grew 120%.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**Content Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Profound:** Tracks individual page citations and integrates with Cloudflare for direct traffic data.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** Lacks direct traffic data and individual page tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will update Scrunch prompts to track the new product.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Strategic Pivot to Sonar:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build pre-launch traffic and visibility for the new AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Cadence:** 15 articles/week for Sonar, replacing the current 5 agentic + 12 old product mix.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Effective February 1.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**New Project: Agent Use Cases Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high search volume with programmatic pages, inspired by sites like Lindy.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [**Status:** Blocked pending Tanmay's delivery of the page template doc and use case list.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Team:** Jacob will be involved in the engineering setup.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Content Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**TLDRs:** Will be added to all Data Engineering Resources, replacing AI Summaries for consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**AI Widgets:** Will be added to all agentic articles to signal relevance to LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Rebranding:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [A full rebrand and new website are planned for the AI-native shift.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Timeline:** \~1–2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [**Impact:** New pages must be built to accommodate the new visual identity.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [Share the Agent Use Cases page template doc.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Share the updated list of agent use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Update Scrunch prompts to track the new product.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Inform Joe of the content pivot to Sonar, effective Feb 1.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Add TLDRs to all Data Engineering Resources.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Mario:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Review the "Connectors Are Living Organisms" article today.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Airbyte Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Add AI summary widgets to all agentic articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KYi7yNtNrPMQB1nMYbiUzJfGQ315QWwN?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
